Operation 'loginUser' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is clear and actionable. Description is missing entirely. Added details about expected inputs (credentials), response structure (token and expiration), and how to use the returned token for subsequent requests to aid AI agent decision-making.

data.current_summary: Authenticate a user and obtain tokens
data.description_suggestion: Authenticates a user with provided credentials and returns authentication tokens for subsequent API requests. Accepts username and password in the request body. Returns a LoginResponse containing an authorization token (for bearerAuth) and token expiration information. This token must be included in the Authorization header for authenticated operations.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description is missing entirely. Added details about expected inputs (credentials), response structure (token and expiration), and how to use the returned token for subsequent requests to aid AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'createThingType' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear. Description is empty. Added context about what thing types are (templates for things), what inputs are expected, what is returned, and authentication requirement. This helps AI agents understand the purpose and when to use this operation in the IoT management workflow.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new thing type definition that serves as a template for IoT things. Accepts a CreateThingTypeRequest containing the thing type name, description, and configuration properties. Returns the created ThingType object with assigned identifier. Thing types define the structure and capabilities of things that will be created from this template. Requires authentication.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear. Description is empty. Added context about what thing types are (templates for things), what inputs are expected, what is returned, and authentication requirement. This helps AI agents understand the purpose and when to use this operation in the IoT management workflow.

Use this operation to fetch thing details before performing operations like data reporting or thing updates.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new IoT thing instance based on a specified thing type. Accepts a CreateThingRequest containing the thing name, thing type identifier, and optional configuration. Returns the created Thing object with assigned identifier and initial state. The thing becomes immediately available for data reporting and management operations. Requires authentication.

data.current_summary: Report data to a thing's resources
data.description_suggestion: Reports sensor or measurement data to a thing's resources for storage and processing. Accepts a ReportDataRequest containing the thing identifier, resource identifiers, and data values. Updates the thing's resource state with the reported data and stores it for historical tracking and analytics. Returns confirmation of successful data ingestion. Requires authentication. This is the primary mechanism for IoT devices to push telemetry data to the MIC platform.
